_description: Canned response that mimics what docs/linear-tool-contract.md declares linear_list_issues returns. Three issues in varied states so scripts/linear-poll.sh normalization exercises assignee/state/label paths on realistic data. Update this fixture ONLY if the real Linear MCP response shape is verified to differ — and update docs/linear-tool-contract.md in the same PR.

issues.title: Add retry logic to the webhook dispatcher
issues.description: The webhook dispatcher currently gives up after the first 5xx response. Add exponential backoff (3 retries max) and surface total-failures as a metric.

issues.title: Fix typo in the settings page subtitle
issues.description: Current copy says 'Manages your prefrences'. Change to 'Manage your preferences'.

issues.title: Investigate slow queries on the reports dashboard
issues.description: Several users reporting >10s load time on /reports. Profile the top 3 queries and propose indexing or caching changes (analysis only — schema changes are a separate ticket).
